column1: # Demo claims for the verification layer. Format: claim<TAB>evidence_type<TAB>evidence_ref
# evidence_type: file | command | paper | db | result | none
Human chr2 is a fusion of two ancestral ape chromosomes
The CGV human-bonobo synteny was reproduced from raw DNA
Gorilla chr3/chr5 carry the 19/4 homology blocks
This pipeline definitively proves the primate ancestor genome
We report the first ever male Nomascus synteny ladder
